test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/module_utils/common/test_locale.py b/test/units/module_utils/common/test_locale.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..a1b2c3d4e5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test/units/module_utils/common/test_locale.py
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
+# (c) Ansible Project
+# GNU General Public License v3.0+ (see COPYING or https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt)
+
+from __future__ import absolute_import, division, print_function
+__metaclass__ = type
+
+from units.compat.mock import MagicMock
+
+from ansible.module_utils.common.locale import get_best_parsable_locale
+
+
+class TestLocale:
+    """Tests for get_best_parsable_locale"""
+
+    mock_module = MagicMock()
+    mock_module.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+
+    def test_finding_last(self):
+        self.mock_module.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "fr_FR.utf8\nen_GB.utf8\nPOSIX\n", ''))
+        locale = get_best_parsable_locale(self.mock_module)
+        assert locale == 'en_GB.utf8'
+
+    def test_default_preference_list(self):
+        """Verify the exact default preference list entries and ordering"""
+        mock = MagicMock()
+        mock.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+        # C.utf8 should be the first default preference
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "C.utf8\nen_US.utf8\nen_GB.utf8\nC\nPOSIX\n", ''))
+        assert get_best_parsable_locale(mock) == 'C.utf8'
+        # en_US.utf8 should be preferred over en_GB.utf8
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "en_GB.utf8\nen_US.utf8\nPOSIX\n", ''))
+        assert get_best_parsable_locale(mock) == 'en_US.utf8'
+        # en_GB.utf8 should be in defaults and preferred over C and POSIX
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "en_GB.utf8\nC\nPOSIX\n", ''))
+        assert get_best_parsable_locale(mock) == 'en_GB.utf8'
+        # C should be preferred over POSIX when no utf8 locales are available
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "C\nPOSIX\n", ''))
+        assert get_best_parsable_locale(mock) == 'C'
+
+    def test_exact_locale_comparison(self):
+        """Matching should be exact string comparison, not case-insensitive"""
+        mock = MagicMock()
+        mock.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "c.utf8\nen_GB.UTF-8\n", ''))
+        locale = get_best_parsable_locale(mock)
+        assert locale == 'POSIX'
+
+    def test_case_sensitive_no_match(self):
+        """Case differences should prevent matching"""
+        mock = MagicMock()
+        mock.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "ENGLISH.UTF8\n", ''))
+        locale = get_best_parsable_locale(mock, preferences=['english.utf8'])
+        assert locale == 'POSIX'
+
+    def test_locale_command_uses_c_environment(self):
+        """Locale enumeration should run under a stable C locale environment"""
+        mock = MagicMock()
+        mock.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "en_GB.utf8\n", ''))
+        locale = get_best_parsable_locale(mock)
+        assert locale == 'en_GB.utf8'
+        mock.run_command.assert_called_once_with(
+            ['/usr/bin/locale', '-a'],
+            environ_update={'LANG': 'C', 'LC_ALL': 'C', 'LC_MESSAGES': 'C'},
+        )
+
+    def test_empty_preferences_uses_defaults(self):
+        """Empty preferences list should fall back to default preferences"""
+        mock = MagicMock()
+        mock.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "en_GB.utf8\nC\nPOSIX\n", ''))
+        locale_with_defaults = get_best_parsable_locale(mock)
+        locale_with_empty = get_best_parsable_locale(mock, preferences=[])
+        assert locale_with_defaults == 'en_GB.utf8'
+        assert locale_with_empty == 'en_GB.utf8'
+
+    def test_no_match_returns_fallback(self):
+        """When no preference matches available locales, return the fallback"""
+        mock = MagicMock()
+        mock.get_bin_path = MagicMock(return_value='/usr/bin/locale')
+        mock.run_command = MagicMock(return_value=(0, "unknown_locale\n", ''))
+        locale = get_best_parsable_locale(mock)
+        assert locale == 'POSIX'
